subject: [PATCH v7 12/20] nfsd: add helper to marshal a fattr4 from completed args

2026-06-16.patch_summary: This patch adds a helper function to marshal the attribute values of an NFSv4 file attribute (fattr4) from completed arguments. The new function, nfsd4_encode_attr_vals(), breaks out the encoding of attr_vals into its own separate function, improving code organization and maintainability.
